notes: 7G7 item 4. Uses the wave-7 pinned LCG (state*1103515245+12345 mod 2^31, high bits state>>16) per the games-determinism law. All pinned deck orders (seed-1/seed-42 shuffles, cuts, riffle powers, round-robin and burn deals, the shuffle-cut-riffle-deal sequence for seed 7) generated by an independent Python oracle implementing the prompt's exact laws. Public deck struct lets the suite build small odd decks to pin the odd-length riffle.
